sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date DateTime, event_description String, flag Nullable(Int8));

INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2000-01-01 12:00:00'), 'New Year', 1), (2, toDateTime('2010-01-04 12:34:56'), 'Some Event', NULL), (3, toDateTime('2023-12-31 23:59:59'), 'End of Year', 0);
SELECT id, formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(event_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS formatted_date FROM test_dates WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE flag IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(event_date, 'dd.MM.yyyy') AS formatted_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IN (SELECT MAX(event_date) FROM test_dates GROUP BY flag);
SELECT id, formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(event_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS formatted_date FROM (SELECT event_date, flag FROM test_dates WHERE flag IN (1, NULL)) AS subquery WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT flag, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM test_dates GROUP BY flag HAVING MAX(formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(event_date, 'HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(event_date, 'yyyy') AS year FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IN (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_description LIKE '%Event%') ORDER BY year;
SELECT event_description, formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(MIN(event_date), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS first_event FROM test_dates GROUP BY event_description HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

SELECT t1.id, t2.formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(t2.event_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') FROM test_dates AS t1 JOIN test_dates AS t2 ON t1.flag = t2.flag WHERE t2.event_description IN (SELECT event_description FROM test_dates WHERE flag = 1);
SELECT formatDateTimeInJodaSyntax(event_date, 'EEE') AS day, COUNT(*) as frequency FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY day HAVING frequency > 1;
